name: add-endpoint
description: Add a single API endpoint to a NakedAPI provider package

provider.description: Provider package name (openai, xai, fal, kimicoding, kie)

upstream_url.description: Link to upstream API documentation for this endpoint

steps.title: Add request/response types for {{provider}} {{endpoint}}
steps.description: Add TypeScript interfaces for the request and response shapes to packages/provider/{{provider}}/src/types.ts. Follow naming conventions: PascalCase for types, include all fields from upstream docs.{{#upstream_url}} Ref: {{upstream_url}}{{/upstream_url}}

steps.title: Add payload schema for {{provider}} {{endpoint}}
steps.description: Add a payloadSchema object and validatePayload function for the {{method}} endpoint. Schema should match the request type definition.

steps.title: Wire {{endpoint}} into {{provider}} factory
steps.description: Add the endpoint method to the factory function in packages/provider/{{provider}}/src/{{provider}}.ts. Use Object.assign for callable namespaces. Export new types from index.ts.

steps.title: Add unit tests for {{provider}} {{endpoint}}
steps.description: Add test cases to tests/unit/providers/{{provider}}.test.ts covering success path, error handling, and payload validation.

steps.title: Add integration test for {{provider}} {{endpoint}}
steps.description: Write tests/integration/{{provider}}-<endpoint-slug>.test.ts using setupPolly/teardownPolly. Record fixtures with POLLY_MODE=record, verify replay passes.

steps.title: Review recordings and open PR for {{provider}} {{endpoint}}
steps.description: User reviews recordings locally (pnpm run harness). User commits recordings. Push and open PR. CI posts harness summary comment.
